title: Revolve (RVLV) Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
text: Revolve Group's recent quarterly earnings demonstrate strong operational momentum. The company reported earnings of $0.26 per share for the most recent quarter, beating the consensus estimate of $0.173 by $0.087 or 50.3%. This earnings surprise reflects strong cost management, operational leverage, and gross margin expansion. Recent quarterly results show RVLV earnings of $0.20 USD per share versus the estimate of $0.19 USD, resulting in a 2.91% positive surprise. Revenue performance has been equally strong, with quarterly revenues reaching $342.88 million, surpassing estimates and representing solid year-over-year growth. Looking forward, analysts project next quarter earnings of $0.23 per share with full-year 2026 estimates of $0.87 per share on $1.33 billion in revenues. The company's improving earnings trajectory and consistent beat rate suggest strong management execution and favorable business momentum in the fashion e-commerce sector.
